use_cases: Toolbar action buttons in application headers or toolbars
Icon-based controls wrapped with accessible tooltips
Action strips for card components or data rows
Form action controls with hover tooltips
Compact UI controls for settings panels or modals
ai_summary: A lightweight action button component with tooltip support, designed as an icon button (size-9) with muted styling that transitions to visible on hover. The Action component wraps buttons in a TooltipProvider for accessible tooltip reveals, making it ideal for toolbar contexts where space is constrained and action labels are provided via tooltips rather than visible text.
